error.message: release evidence is incomplete; inspect failure_codes and summary for the stable machine-readable failure contract

artifacts.command: save OpenID Foundation Config OP suite result JSON as openid-config-op-result.json
artifacts.name: openid_config_op_conformance

artifacts.command: save OpenID Foundation Basic OP suite result JSON as openid-basic-op-result.json
artifacts.name: openid_basic_op_conformance

artifacts.command: save normalized Okta connector smoke summary as scim-okta-connector-smoke.json
artifacts.name: scim_okta_connector_smoke

artifacts.command: save normalized Microsoft Entra connector smoke summary as scim-entra-connector-smoke.json
artifacts.name: scim_entra_connector_smoke

artifacts.command: set DATABASE_URL to a restored production-like Postgres database, then run cairn-api operations restore-check > restore-drill.json
artifacts.name: restore_drill

artifacts.command: set DATABASE_URL to a production-like or restored Postgres drill database, then run the state-changing command cairn-api signing-key rotate > signing-key-rotation-drill.json
artifacts.name: signing_key_rotation_drill

artifacts.command: set DATABASE_URL to a production-like or restored Postgres drill database, then run the state-changing command cairn-api key-encryption rotate > kek-rotation-drill.json
artifacts.name: kek_rotation_drill

artifacts.command: set DATABASE_URL to a production-like or restored Postgres drill database, then run the state-changing command cairn-api admin break-glass-owner <user-email> > break-glass-admin-recovery-drill.json
artifacts.name: break_glass_admin_recovery_drill

artifacts.command: set DATABASE_URL to a production-like or restored Postgres drill database, then run cairn-api audit export-ndjson <output-path> > audit-export-archive-drill.json
artifacts.name: audit_export_archive_drill

artifacts.command: set DATABASE_URL to a production-like or restored Postgres drill database, then run the state-changing command cairn-api audit purge-expired > audit-retention-purge-drill.json
artifacts.name: audit_retention_purge_drill
